news.headline: The Club's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Friday
news.summary: OpenAI is reportedly considering delaying its IPO until 2027, and SpaceX is weighing a deeper push into mobile services.

news.headline: OpenAI and Anthropic face new AI reality as companies shift from tokenmaxxing to efficiency
news.summary: Companies are tightening their AI budgets to focus on getting a return on their investment, and that could dampen growth rates at OpenAI and Anthropic.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $706.36 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $729.07 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bearish — favor puts / short delta.
Use QQQ $706.36 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: AAPL PUT — enter $8.35–$9.23, target $13.18+, stop $5.27.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -1.40% and SPY -0.71%. Composite sentiment -40 (Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, spy trend, vix. VIX at 16.65 (+3.29%). Environment read: favor puts / short delta. Healthcare (+3.99%) is leading while Energy (-0.62%) lags. Premarket strength in LLY, NFLX; weakness in AMD, AVGO. The desk's highest-conviction setup is AAPL (6.9/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
